title: Crunchy Comforting Filipino Oats Lumpia
description: A savory and comforting Filipino dish featuring rolled oats, poached eggs, and a crunchy exterior, all in a mini cocotte. Perfect for a quick and easy breakfast or snack.
instructions: In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the ground pork and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the salt and black pepper and stir to combine.
Add the rolled oats and stir to combine.
Add the water, sugar, and pineapple juice and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, or until the oats have absorbed most of the liquid.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the oat mixture into a mini cocotte.
Place a poached egg on top of the oat mixture.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
